text: I am struck by the contrast between these two spaces. In the first, the soft, open room with scattered cushions and empty silence invokes a sense of anticipation and a slight loneliness, as though awaiting presence or conversation. I feel reflective; my mind fills the space with potential ideas and stories. In the second image, the colorful, dynamic wall bursting with information and technology feels energizing. Surrounded by the theme of research and development, I sense curiosity and excitement. Here, I feel more alive—drawn into the stream of innovation, eager to contemplate how humans and machines intertwine. Being here makes me conscious of my place in the ongoing flow of thought and progress.
